theme.archetype: 1 (Organic & Trust) heavily adapted to User Specific Colors
theme.instructions: Follow the exact color schemes provided by the user. The app must feel like a modern, reliable medical command center that clearly guides Healthcare Assistants to their 'Next Best Action'.

font_families.heading: font-sans (Use Manrope or Work Sans. DO NOT USE INTER)
font_families.body: font-sans (Use IBM Plex Sans or similar highly legible font for data)

typography.rules: Never center-align data tables or forms. Left-align for scannability. Use tabular-nums for vitals and revenue figures.

layout.spacing_system: Use generous padding inside cards (p-5 or p-6). Gap between dashboard bento cards should be gap-4 or gap-6.
layout.dashboard_grid: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col bento grid. Utilize col-span logic for main charts vs sidebars.
layout.cards: rounded-xl border border-slate-100 bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
layout.header: Sticky top-0 z-50 p-4 shadow-md bg-gradient-to-r from-[#009688] to-[#4CAF50]

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#F44336] to-[#FF5722] text-white rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity font-medium px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2
buttons.icon_quick_action: flex items-center justify-center p-3 rounded-xl transition-colors

charts.rules: Use smooth lines (type='monotone') for vitals trends. Ensure tooltips are styled with white background and slate text.

tables.style: Shadcn Table, border-b border-slate-100, text-sm, compact padding (py-3)

visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient subtle shadows. Avoid heavy block shadows.
visual_enhancers.motion: Use simple hover states (-translate-y-0.5) on quick action cards. No excessive animations.

images.description: Modern clinic interior with teal accents - good for empty states or welcome banners.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using standard HTML/Tailwind for layouts and Shadcn for complex components (Tables, Dropdowns, Tabs).
Use Recharts for rendering Health Vitals (BP, Sugar, Weight) in the Patient Detail View.
Implement the 'Opportunity Center / Next Best Action' visually distinct with the pink-coral CTA gradient (#F44336 to #FF5722) to highlight revenue-generating tasks.
The App Header must use the Teal gradient (#009688 to #4CAF50).
Quick action cards must use the specified colored icons (Blue, Purple, Orange, Green) with soft tinted backgrounds (e.g. bg-blue-50 text-blue-500).
Cards must be white with subtle shadow and border (e.g. rounded-xl bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm).
Ensure the layout feels like a data-dense, functional 'Control Room' for Healthcare Assistants.
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g. data-testid='book-lab-test-button').
